verse_text: And He took it and ate in their presence.

pericope.title: The Women Find the Tomb Empty

links.context: The Fathers teach that Jesus also drinks the cup of His own Blood. This He does to lead all believers into participation in His heavenly mysteries. In My Father's kingdom relates to the time after His Resurrection, when Christ will eat and drink to show the reality of His victory over death ([[LUK.24:41]]-43). Furthermore, it points to the eternal banquet of the Kingdom in the age to come.
